name: ILibraryViewCustomization
summary: Provides methods to customize library view

methods.name: AddElements(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Wpf.Interfaces.LayoutElement>, string)
methods.summary: Allows clients to add a list of elements to a given section. This operation will fail if the text property of any of the child elements of the given section matches with the text property of the given elements.

params.name: elements
params.doc: List of layout elements to add

params.name: sectionText
params.doc: The name of the section to be updated

returns.doc: True if the operation was successful

methods.name: AddIncludeInfo(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Wpf.Interfaces.LayoutIncludeInfo>, string)
methods.summary: Allows clients to add a list of layout include info to a given section. This operation will fail if the path property of any of the includes of the given section conflicts with the path property of the given includes.

params.name: includes
params.doc: List of layout include info to add

params.name: sectionText
params.doc: The name of the section to be updated

returns.doc: True if the operation was successful

methods.name: AddSections(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Wpf.Interfaces.LayoutSection>)
methods.summary: Allows clients to add a new section to the layout specification. This operation will fail if the current specification already contains a section with the same text as of the given section. The clients must call AddElements method to add layout elements to a given section.

returns.doc: True if the operation was successful

methods.name: GetSpecification
methods.summary: Gets a copy of the current library layout specification

methods.name: OnAppShutdown
methods.summary: This method can be called by host application to notify the aplication shutdown so that the customization service can do the cleanup of resources.

methods.name: RegisterResourceStream(string, System.IO.Stream)
methods.summary: Registers a given resource stream for a given url. If registered successfully the requested resource is returned from the given stream.

params.name: urlpath
params.doc: relative path of url including extension of the resource, e.g. /myicons/xicon.png

returns.doc: True if the operation was successful

methods.name: SetSpecification(Dynamo.Wpf.Interfaces.LayoutSpecification)
methods.summary: Sets the given specification as the current library layout specification by overwriting the current one.

methods.name: ToJSONStream
methods.summary: Serializes the current specification to JSON stream

events.name: SpecificationUpdated
events.summary: This event is raised when the specification is updated
